---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with an example or documentation
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Affected Example
Which example or file has the issue?

- [ ] Basic examples (01-08)
- [ ] Real-world examples
- [ ] Advanced examples
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to example '...'
2. Run command '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen when running the example.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens. Include error messages, stack traces, etc.

## Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- Node.js version: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- LangChain version: [e.g. 0.1.20]
- TypeScript version: [e.g. 5.3.0]
- Operating System: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Package manager: [npm/yarn/pnpm]

## Code Sample
```typescript
// Include code that reproduces the issue

```

## Error Message
```
Paste error message here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Possible Solution
If you have ideas on how to fix this, please describe them here.
